title: arthraxon schimperi
intro: Arthraxon schimperi, also known as African hairgrass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arthraxon schimperi include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and it is also used in traditional African medicine to make teas and tinctures.
